description: P5 Female multi-sport. 35yo female, 64kg/168cm, very active. Triathlon (swim+bike+run) plus 2 S&C/week. Performance priority for Olympic-distance triathlon. Mixed sources (Garmin run/bike, manual swim). Today is cross_train (cycling). Stresses cross-train coverage + sleep emphasis.

rationale: Soreness low, energy high; HRV at persona baseline.
Recent training distribution balanced across run + cross + strength.
Persona runs 3x/week as part of the triathlon block.
Recent 10km tempo at avg HR 150 sits within Olympic-distance race aerobic envelope.
Sleep window 22:00-06:00 with ~7.5h average; competitive performance load benefits from a structured wind-down.
Sleep score holding near persona baseline at 82.
Subjective stress score 2 with stable HRV; no escalation signal.
Persona has 2 strength sessions per week supporting triathlon performance; today's plan supports the next scheduled S&C day.
Recent strength volume tracks persona baseline at ~3500kg session.
Daily targets ~2600 kcal / 130g protein for performance; recent intake holds against targets.
Female competitive-athlete protein intake remains the priority floor under volume.
